mapper.select: select * from study_timer_record where user_id = #{userId} and status = 'active' order by id desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into study_timer_record ( user_id, task_name, planned_end_time, actual_end_time, planned_minutes, duration_seconds, status, bind_pomodoro_flag, pomodoro_study_minutes, pomodoro_break_minutes, completed_pomodoro_count, completion_notified_flag ) values ( #{userId}, #{taskName}, #{plannedEndTime}, #{actualEndTime}, #{plannedMinutes}, #{durationSeconds}, #{status}, #{bindPomodoroFlag}, #{pomodoroStudyMinutes}, #{pomodoroBreakMinutes}, #{completedPomodoroCount}, #{completionNotifiedFlag} )
mapper.update: update study_timer_record set actual_end_time = #{actualEndTime}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, completed_pomodoro_count = #{completedPomodoroCount}, status = #{status} where id = #{sessionId} and status = 'active'
update study_timer_record set completion_notified_flag = 1 where id = #{sessionId} and completion_notified_flag = 0
